standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per anchor-qualified summary target

identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: hospital-admission-level identifier and target retained key

database_mapping.source_grain: one row per hospital admission in hosp_admissions
database_mapping.target_grain: one row per standardized hospital-admission duration summary

summary_build_translation.qualifying_row_translation: every hosp_admissions row with subject_id, hadm_id, admittime, and dischtime is a candidate retained hospital-admission duration row
summary_build_translation.selection_translation: one source hospital admission row maps directly to one retained duration summary row
summary_build_translation.aggregation_translation: compute (dischtime - admittime) in days and round half away from zero to 3 decimal places
summary_build_translation.no_source_row_translation: do not synthesize rows for absent hospital admission encounters; required MIMIC admission rows are retained with explicit validity status
summary_build_translation.partial_window_translation: not_applicable_full_hospital_admission_interval; negative or edge-case intervals are retained and flagged rather than silently removed

validation_contract.no_source_row_policy_check: hospital admissions are the target source rows; no additional null target rows are synthesized outside hosp_admissions
validation_contract.join_failure_action: fail_for_required_hosp_admissions_input; icustay_detail is audit-only and must not replace primary interval calculation
notes: The retained target grain is hospital admission encounter, not ICU stay.
The retained primary duration is computed from hosp_admissions.admittime and hosp_admissions.dischtime.
source_supplied_derived.icustay_detail.los_hospital is used only as an ICU-linked audit subset and is not the retained primary source.
Negative-duration edge cases remain in the retained asset with hospital_los_validity_status=negative_duration; downstream cohorts must decide explicitly whether to exclude them.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint reads this mapping spec and delegates to the current local reviewed implementation until a more fully spec-native runner replaces it.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_hospital_los_days outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path rather than side SQL or ad hoc rebuilds.
